return(function(...)local X={"\075\114\055\109\051\104\069\106";"\055\057\088\117\112\054\051\089\047\067\069\080\047\057\112\043","\057\081\067\053\106\051\118\061";"";"\080\115\051\122\079\072\119\065\081\079\089\118\117\102\074\106";"\100\102\061\061","\104\084\103\120\100\102\061\061";"\082\048\107\085\075\115\076\114\066\102\061\061","\085\065\055\104\089\073\122\086\087\102\061\061","\069\085\068\119\077\048\107\061","\068\054\053\084\112\114\086\051\047\118\082\079\079\048\111\047","\105\116\112\053\105\075\081\113\067\069\056\075\098\106\105\085\069\109\066\069\079\069\078\110\122\067\097\089\076\087\074\067\110\122\107\049\079\070\049\116\102\079\100\061","\090\049\120\077\106\120\105\061";"\069\080\072\071\069\047\061\061";"\077\048\101\102\110\048\112\115","\077\085\122\097\077\052\111\053\055\080\107\061";"\102\102\061\061","\055\068\053\075\069\057\100\117\077\072\083\101\068\114\103\116\077\090\061\061","\107\057\108\116\043\048\101\078","\077\085\086\097\043\102\061\061","\054\117\122\078\110\102\061\061";"\068\054\110\097\112\114\084\101\069\076\111\057\069\079\099\085\047\102\061\061","\107\080\086\113\069\085\122\082","\051\105\055\111\115\109\049\099\076\100\067\061";"\069\083\068\101\047\072\111\076\107\078\068\099\055\067\082\116\114\047\061\061","\069\068\077\054\055\118\086\071\047\050\072\119\114\097\067\118\043\054\107\061","\066\087\120\068\057\116\057\068\111\097\043\103\103\109\061\061","\079\043\088\083\050\121\047\102\097\090\061\061";"\116\110\079\098\079\049\113\104\066\108\086\099\065\102\061\061","\077\048\086\085\068\085\068\076\056\054\051\069\110\078\100\103\055\090\061\061","\108\118\087\108\087\075\079\108","\048\079\072\050\107\117\086\074\077\048\072\108\069\054\047\102","\048\079\077\106\048\085\103\070\056\052\086\103\114\054\051\070";"\106\072\103\104\070\043\106\061","\107\080\082\085\055\083\068\112\079\050\072\066\108\117\114\102\056\090\061\061","\052\100\107\078\121\112\047\047","\056\048\051\051\108\048\086\069\047\080\068\108\110\078\067\117 return(function(X,K,p,J,x,W,s,m,y,Y,D,g,R,I,j,z,e,a,E,k,M,h,S)E,S,k,M,R,D,z,a,e,Y,I,g,m,j,y,h=function()g=(-476860-(-476861))+g R[g]=-450125+450126 return g end,function(X,f)local K=e(f)local p=function(p,J,x,W,s,m)return Y(X,{p;J,x,W,s;m},f,K)end return p end,function(X,f)local K=e(f)local p=function(p,J,x)return Y(X,{p;J;x},f,K)end return p end,function(X,f)local K=e(f)local p=function(p,J,x,W)return Y(X,{p;J;x,W},f,K)end return p end,{},function(X)R[X]=R[X]-(751660-751659)if-331102-(-331102)==R[X]then R[X],m[X]=nil,nil end end,function(X,f)local K=e(f)local J({},{[f(256570+-300212)]=a;[f(70302-113905)]=X;[f(-576635-(-533077))]=function()return 328507+-4450602 end})end end,function(Y,p,J,x)local P,g,w,E4,M4,H4,n4,C,G,s,k4,R4,c,Q,d,B4,R,L,t,a,c4,V4,z4,b4,L4,F,W4,D4,N,A,u,l4,S4,Z,l,O,K4,e4,m4,B,w4,X4,r,x4,J4,s4,U4,i,H,y4,U,Q4,a4,T,v,Y4,j4,v4,f4,C4,e,I4,p4,o,G4,q,F4,n,g4,V,h4,b while Y do if Y<-54508+8987679 then if Y<(-121802+-427890)+4905399 then if Y<767941+(2143596-730231)then if Y<((101337+-575991)-(-847568))+719362 then if Y<461171+-76085 then if Y<1187843-994993 then if
